query:
INSERT INTO performers (name, performerType, imageUrl, bio) VALUES
('Mia Khalifa', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/chOkvAMmZMSPVFIe.png', 'Cultural icon and performer with Middle Eastern heritage known for meteoric rise to fame.'),
('Asa Akira', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/QfdwtHOzBRlgNOav.png', 'Award-winning Asian performer and industry veteran with Hall of Fame status.'),
('Elsa Jean', 'Girl Next Door', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/rYvPkenpTIRMLGlD.png', 'Petite platinum blonde with youthful charm and rising star talent.'),
('Dani Daniels', 'Legend', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/EoPlhEyNYstARSrA.png', 'Top performer known for artistic style and specialist approach to performances.'),
('Brandi Love', 'MILF', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310419663028198646/XhLSJPvFzuqkWMZm.png', 'Mature blonde legend with sophisticated elegance and veteran industry status.')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
imageUrl = VALUES(imageUrl),
performerType = VALUES(performerType),
bio = VALUES(bio);
